first_night.en: Wait for a few seconds. End the Night Phase.
first_night.zh-Hans: 稍等一会。结束夜晚阶段。
first_night.es-419: Espera unos segundos. Termina la Fase de la Noche.

other_nights.en: Wait for a few seconds. End the Night Phase.
other_nights.zh-Hans: 稍等一会。结束夜晚阶段。
other_nights.es-419: Espera unos segundos. Termina la Fase de la Noche.
